titleStmt.title: SII 6.823: original edition by K. V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 823. (A.R. No. 283-C of 1899). IN THE SAME PLACE.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . śākābdē biṁducaṁdratriśaśiparimitēThe first seven lines are written over an erasure.
śakavaruṣaṁbulu 1310 nēṁṭi kā¨rttika kṛṣṇa saptami gu
ruvāramunāṁḍu koppulayaṁgāri dēvulu muppamadē
vi śrīkoppulayyaṁgāriki
¨ryyābhi vṛddhigānunnu tamaku Āyurarōgyēśva
yyābhivṛddhigānu śrīnarasihyanāthuniki Amṛtamaṇiki [A]du
lāpali Ūru sama¨rppiṁccenu Iṁdula Āyamaṁdunnu vīri vri
ṣṭukēsuUṁḍi pagameccugaṁḍa bhōgamusēsina ni¨rnna
yamu śrī Amudupaḍitalyalu 11 kuḍumulu 15 Aṭlu
bhōṁḍalu 10 pusulu 100 veṁjāmaralu 2 tirumajjanamu
kalaśa 1 Iṁdulaku peruU kuṁca 1 palu kuṁccalu 4 nu
pānna pālukalaśalu 2 ki kuṁcalu 6 gā kuṁcalu 10 kilā
rijītamu polamu puṭlu 3 Amudupaḍi piṁḍivaṁṭala
ku peśalu minumulu tu 2 neI A 2 kaṁḍamu pala 2 [I]
ṁtavaṭṭunnu sama¨rppaṇasēsi I prasādānaku kolupulu
44 koluvaṁgalāru kolici prasādamu bujiṁpaṁgalāru
sannidhi saṁpradāyamu kolupulu 12 ki cāmaralu 2
naṁbhyalu ku 2 paricaraṁ ku 3 garakaṭi pulumaṁda ku 2 Aṭla
Asuvalu ku 2 guḍivāḷa siṁgu tirumajanaṁ ku 1 siṁgirini gōku 1
puramaṁna gōku 1 jaganata śihya gōku 1 sikarinaṁkiḷana gōku 1 jinnataḷavā
ra koḍku varadana gōku 1 megapu siṁganēṁḍu gōku 1 Itimana gōku 1
Aphānna Abhaḷana gōku 1 samadepedi Alakasinara[I]ri siṁgana ku 1
gōpinata ciṁgana varadana cētana gōku 1 dēvinagōpu jinata narusula ku 1
maḷi varadana pacanala ku 1 vallabhanaṁbhyāḷu kṛṣṇula ku 1 nu kalupeṭṭi
madi siṁgunala ku 1 jeṟigōpu suṁdaragolladi ku 1 vasudēvabhāṁḍa siṁga
ri ku 1 Ānnumadana briṁdāvallabhagiku 1 siraṁgakōdi valabhakōdi ku 1 Uttaṁnatisi
taḷarugi ku 1 Ēkakure ku 1 kēśavabhāratulamaṭana ku 1 Ī dha¨rmu śrīvaiṣṇa
va rakṣa śrī śrī śrī
Digital edition of SII 6.823 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
